## 2024-05-24 - Missing SameSite attribute in Session Cookies
**Vulnerability:** Cookies generated by `Amber::Router::Cookies::Store`, `EncryptedStore`, `PermanentStore`, and `SignedStore` lacked support for the `SameSite` attribute.
**Learning:** This exposes the application and users to Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) and Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking (CSWSH) vulnerabilities as modern browsers may default to Lax but being explicit ensures control.
**Prevention:** Support `samesite` on cookie generation so the framework defaults to more secure behavior.
